You could be just a couple years older and maybe chose to give your college funds to your siblings or maybe you’re an older fella who’s just a workin man 🤷🤷. HAVE FUN YOU GUYS I HOPE YOU LOVE HIM :p

Edit: Fun fact I forgot to include earlier- Antoine is actually gay as well 😈
